excluded.GET /api/auth/oauth: Browser OAuth redirect flow; not scriptable in a CLI
excluded.GET /api/auth/oauth/callback: Browser OAuth callback redirect; not a CLI surface
excluded.GET /api/auth/refresh: Session-token refresh; CLI uses long-lived user/API tokens
excluded.GET /api/event/options: Deprecated; superseded by GET /api/event/types (wrapped by `platform event-log types`)
excluded.POST /api/app/about/clear-cache: UI-triggered cache clear; CLI uses `admin maintenance clear-cache`
excluded.POST /api/auth/logout: Server session logout; `marvin logout` clears local credentials
excluded.POST /api/auth/token: Raw token issuance; handled by `marvin login`
excluded.POST /api/hooks/{token}: Public ingress receiver for external producers (token-auth, drops an incoming_webhook event); not a management surface. The CLI manages these via /api/incoming-webhooks/*.
